Knowledge base
Frequently asked questions
Can I make any changes to my plan after I sign up?
Yes! If you’re on a
Starter
plan with a month-to-month commitment, you can make changes at any time.
If you’re on a
Starter
plan with an annual commitment, or a Professional or Enterprise plan, you can upgrade at any time within your annual contract term. This includes increasing contacts or monthly emails, selecting add-ons or upgrading to the next plan tier.
For customers on a plan with an annual commitment, you cannot downgrade within the contract term period.
What is your cancellation policy?
Monthly commitments can be canceled at any time and will be effective from your next billing/renewal date. Annual commitments require a 30 day cancellation notice either in-app or by contacting your Customer Success Manager.
Are taxes included?
Taxes that may apply are not included in the pricing and will be calculated based on the laws and regulations of the taxing authority(ies) governing the business location you provide. US customers can submit a Sales Tax Exemption Certificate to
finance@ortto.com
to be applied to their account.
How does billing work?
Our billing management system is designed to be self-serve so you can take control of the entire experience directly within Ortto. You can select a new plan, make changes to an existing plan, generate and sign contracts, and set up your payments from within the system.
How do I change my billing contact details?
The billing contact on a contract can be changed as a new contract is generated. You can select any billing contact who is currently set up with those permissions in your account settings.
To add or remove billing contacts to your account, the account owner or admin should
follow these instructions
.

NFP
Jumbo Interactive
Seamlessly connect Jumbo Interactive’s digital lottery platform with Ortto’s AI-powered marketing automation suite to grow players, boost engagement, and maximize fundraising impact.
Raisely
Connect Raisely’s powerful fundraising platform with Ortto’s AI-driven marketing automation to deliver personalized donor journeys, improve retention, and grow lifetime impact.
Salesforce
Follow up new Salesforce leads, assign leads and opportunities and convert leads to customers.
Stripe
Unlock your customer, trial, subscription, charge and invoice data in Ortto so you can see the activities and actions that are linked to revenue.
Shopify
Re-engage customers, recover lost revenue and grow your store faster with Ortto, a marketing automation, customer data, and analytics platform designed for Shopify.
Pipedrive
Deliver a better pre and post sales customer experience and close more deals by creating connected, personalized experiences across all your channels.
Zapier
Bring all of your customer data together in Ortto with zaps to over 4,000+ of your favorite applications.
Slack
Integrate Slack notifications into your customer journey with Ortto to alert your team when they need to take action and keep track of progress towards your goals.
Facebook
Nurture leads from Facebook with marketing automation journeys.
Twilio Segment
Use your Segment data in Ortto to create personalized, multi-channel experiences across the entire customer lifecycle.
Big Commerce
Grow your online store faster with Ortto, a customer data and marketing automation platform designed for BigCommerce.
Calendly
Integrate Calendly with Ortto to unlock a single customer view and create personalized customer experiences.
Chargebee
Unlock your customer, trial, subscription, charge and invoice data in Ortto so you can see the activities and actions that are linked to revenue.
Gorgias
Combine your helpdesk data with all your other customer data to create a single, 360 view of your customer with Ortto.
HubSpot
Use Ortto to integrate your HubSpot CRM customer data, then create customer journeys to automate repetitive tasks and send personalized messages to customers.
Google Ads
Use your first-party data in Ortto to sync audiences for Google Ads retargeting and lookalike campaigns.
Help Scout
Combine your customer support data with all your other customer data to create a single, 360 view of your customer with Ortto.
Zendesk
Combine your customer support data with all your other customer data to create a single, 360 view of your customer with Ortto.
Intercom
Build personalized campaigns and leverage powerful reporting using Intercom data. Or, set up Talk in Ortto to consolidate your stack.
Magento
Leverage customer, purchase, cart, and review data in Ortto to create highly-personalized campaigns, build audience segments, and create reports and dashboards.
Recurly
Unlock your customer, trial, subscription, charge and invoice data in Ortto so you can see what activities and actions are linked to revenue.
Typeform
Automatically sync your Typeform submissions to Ortto so you can trigger marketing automation and report on results.
Squarespace
Drive more orders and repeat customers with timely, personalized journeys triggered by your Squarespace data.
Kudosity
Centralize contact data and build SMS campaigns in Ortto, then send messages through Kudosity.
Tall Bob
Build SMS messages and manage contact data in Ortto, then send it through Tall Bob.
WooCommerce
Grow your online store faster with Ortto, a customer data and marketing automation platform designed for WooCommerce.
PrestaShop
Grow your online store faster with Ortto, a customer data and marketing automation platform designed for Prestashop.

hits.title: The /unblock API from Browserless: dodging bot detection as a service
Uber must turn over information about its acquisition of Otto to Waymo

analysis.name: Ortto
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one marketing automation, customer data platform, analytics, and support inbox unified in a single platform.
analysis.ideal_customer: Growth and marketing teams at SaaS, e-commerce, and B2B companies who need multi-channel automation tied to a CDP without stitching together separate tools

features.name: visual journey builder
features.description: Drag-and-drop canvas for building multi-step automated customer journeys

features.name: drag and drop email builder
features.description: No-code email editor for creating marketing emails

features.name: email a/b testing
features.description: Test subject lines, sender details, content, or send time across variants
features.evidence_quote: Testing of email subject, sender details, content or send time

features.name: email personalization
features.description: Insert contact and behavioral data into email content

features.name: ai subject line generator
features.description: AI-generated subject line suggestions with predicted open rate scoring
features.evidence_quote: Get subject line suggestions and predict email open rates, before you even hit send.

features.name: ai open rate predictions
features.description: Predict email open rates before sending using AI
features.evidence_quote: Predict email open rates before you hit send

features.name: email template manager
features.description: Save and reuse frequently used emails as templates
features.evidence_quote: Save frequently used emails as templates

features.name: email asset manager
features.description: Centralized management of all email creative assets
features.evidence_quote: Easily manage all email assets from one place

features.name: email preference center
features.description: Self-serve portal letting contacts manage their communication preferences
features.evidence_quote: Contacts can control which types of communications they receive

features.name: email frequency rate limiting
features.description: Prevents contacts from receiving multiple emails within a short time window
features.evidence_quote: Prevent recipients from receiving multiple emails in a short timeframe

features.name: email send date blocking
features.description: Block sending on specific dates such as holidays or weekends
features.evidence_quote: Prevent sending emails on specific dates like holidays or weekends

features.name: branded link tracking
features.description: Tracked campaign links appear under the sender's own domain
features.evidence_quote: Tracked links sent from your campaigns will appear branded to your domain

features.name: timezone-based delivery
features.description: Send emails at the optimal local time for each recipient
features.evidence_quote: Send to recipients at the right time for them

features.name: scheduled email campaigns
features.description: Schedule one-time broadcast emails to send at a future time

features.name: html email template support
features.description: Import and use custom HTML email templates

features.name: dynamic email content
features.description: Dynamically insert data from an external endpoint into email content
features.evidence_quote: Dynamically insert data from an external endpoint

features.name: transactional email
features.description: Send non-marketing transactional emails that bypass marketing suppression rules
features.evidence_quote: Specify non-marketing emails which should always be sent

features.name: delivery load distribution
features.description: Send bulk emails in batches to improve deliverability and spread server load
features.evidence_quote: Send bulk emails in batches to improve deliverability and spread out website and support load

differentiators: Customer data, marketing automation, analytics, and support (Talk) unified in one platform — no stitching required
Checkmate tracking® — proprietary cross-channel behavioral tracking technology
MCP server for AI-agent-driven campaign management and reporting via natural language
Multi-region data hosting (EU, USA, Australia) for data residency flexibility
Integrated CDP means segmentation and personalization draw from a single source of truth
Support inbox (Talk) with live chat, AI responses, calls, and screen sharing built-in alongside marketing tools
Ortto is joining Canva — strategic backing from a large design platform

recent_ships.what: Ortto MCP server — AI agent integration for natural-language campaign management and reporting
recent_ships.source: docs: 'Connect your AI agent with Ortto's MCP server to enable data analysis, campaign management, and reporting through natural language.'
landing: 'Ortto is joining Canva! 🚀 See the full announcement here'

praised: Ease of use and fast onboarding: 'Ortto is a seamless tool that is so easy to learn and can plug into your CRM, website, or other tools you use'
Breadth of features out of the box: 'you get access to so many features right from the get-go — it can honestly be your one-stop platform for marketing activities'
Data-driven personalization: 'Ortto makes it very easy and intuitive to incorporate actual data'
Scalability: 'The beauty of it is that it grows with you'
Unique capability claims: 'Nobody else out there has what Ortto has'
Journey-driven growth: 'We unlocked so much growth in our emails' (375% increase in first reviews via journeys at TrustRadius)
Rated 4.4/5 on G2, 4.6/5 on Capterra, 8.8/10 on TrustRadius

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: Journey builder, email, SMS, forms, A/B testing, AI suggestions, reporting, Google SSO, Talk inbox; priced per contacts

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Starter + mobile push, dynamic content, landing pages, NPS, lead scoring, dedicated IPs, transactional email/SMS, webhooks, custom roles

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Professional + Okta SSO, MS AD, multiple workspaces, SLA, dedicated CSM, deliverability consultant, AWS/GCP integrations

pricing.notes: Prices are contact-count-based (slider from 10,000 contacts up); shown prices are at 10,000 contacts paid annually. Quarterly billing = -10% vs monthly; annual = -15% vs monthly. Dedicated IPs are an add-on on Professional. Dedicated deliverability support is a paid add-on. Not-for-profit 20% discount available on Enterprise. 14-day free trial on all plans. No permanent free tier.
